user.title: Add AwoX Smart Plug
user.description: Select your plug from the discovered devices, or type its Bluetooth MAC address.

error.invalid_address: That doesn't look like a valid Bluetooth MAC address.

init.title: AwoX Smart Plug options
init.description: How often to poll the plug for power and on/off state.

factory_reset.name: Factory reset
factory_reset.description: Factory-resets the plug. This permanently erases the plug's stored energy history and cannot be undone.

confirm.name: Confirm
confirm.description: Must be enabled to proceed. This erases all stored energy history on the plug.
